A.evidence: Faithful prose with italics preserved and rich cross-reference/page anchor links; only glitch is a garbled footnote-3 anchor (<sup>&</sup>lt;sup>3</sup>). No data tables reached in excerpt; inline stats kept as plain unicode.

B.evidence: Accurate text but merges 'A goal' into 'Agoal' and converts curly quotes to single quotes; authors fragmented one-per-line and figures shown as <!-- image --> placeholders.

C.evidence: Good prose and best inline LaTeX ($85 \pm 3\%$, $^3$), but top-level headings (Abstract, 1 Introduction, 2 Related work) are plain text with no # markup, and drops 'to outputs' in the held-out-labelers sentence.

D.evidence: Renders the author block as a well-formed markdown table and uses ## headings, but misreads 'Tamkin' as 'Tamarin' in the intro citation list and drops the x from '100x fewer parameters'.
